//: Editor preset for str-as's global mode. Add it to your assembly tsconfig's `extends` array so the TS language server loads str-as's ambient typings (`str`) with no import - e.g. { "extends": ["assemblyscript/std/assembly.json", "str-as/globals.json"], "include": ["./**/*.ts"] }. Pairs with `--transform str-as/transform`, which injects the runtime import at compile time. typeRoots is re-pointed (relative to this file in node_modules/str-as) because AssemblyScript's std config sets typeRoots:["types"], which otherwise blocks resolving str-as/globals from node_modules. Assumes a hoisted node_modules (npm/yarn); for pnpm or unusual layouts, drop a copy of str-as/globals/index.d.ts into your assembly directory instead.
